Who We Are

Your Trusted Handyman in Virginia Beach

Virginia Beach Handyman started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable handyman services to our neighbors. We saw a need for skilled professionals who treat every home as their own.

We believe in clear communication, upfront pricing, and meticulous workmanship. Our team is dedicated to exceeding expectations, ensuring every project is completed to the highest standards.

We're proud to be a part of the Virginia Beach community. We support local initiatives and are committed to providing exceptional service that strengthens our neighborhoods.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Virginia Beach Handyman

Expert Craftsmanship

Experienced professionals delivering top-quality repairs and installations.

Reliable Service

Punctual, dependable, and committed to getting the job done right the first time.

Upfront Pricing

Honest and transparent pricing with no hidden fees or surprises.

Local Expertise

Deep understanding of Virginia Beach homes and the challenges they face.

Get Your Free Estimate Today

Let us handle your home repairs and improvements with expertise and care.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Virginia Beach Handyman did an amazing job repairing a large hole in my living room wall. The repair is seamless, and you can't even tell there was ever any damage. They were professional, efficient, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Drywall Repair
“

Our deck was in rough shape after the winter. Virginia Beach Handyman replaced several damaged boards and re-stained the entire deck. It looks brand new! They were quick to respond and provided a fair quote. The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is that the cleanup could have been a little better.

John B. Deck Repair
“

I recently moved and had a ton of furniture to assemble. Virginia Beach Handyman saved me so much time and stress! They were efficient, professional, and assembled everything perfectly. Great service!

Emily K. Furniture Assembly
“

Excellent service! Virginia Beach Handyman installed a new front door for us, and it looks fantastic. The installation was seamless, and they took the time to ensure everything was properly sealed and secure. Highly recommend their door installation services.

David L. Door Installation
“

Virginia Beach Handyman cleaned my gutters quickly and efficiently. They were very thorough and even pointed out a few areas that needed minor repairs. I appreciate their attention to detail and would definitely use them again.

Jessica P. Gutter Cleaning
“

I had a cracked window that needed repair. Virginia Beach Handyman came out quickly and replaced the glass. The service was prompt, professional, and affordable. I'm very happy with the results.

Robert T. Window Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does drywall repair take?
The time required depends on the size and severity of the damage, but most repairs can be completed in a single day.
Can you match the existing texture of my walls?
Yes, our skilled technicians are experts at matching a wide variety of textures, ensuring a seamless repair.
Do you offer painting services after the repair?
Yes, we offer complete painting services to ensure a uniform and professional finish.
